summary: Dashboard empty state correctly displays core functionality with proper navigation, billing estimates, and free plan usage tracking. The interface meets all functional requirements from the screen spec. However, there are visual design inconsistencies with the established diner aesthetic - the interface uses neutral gray/beige tones instead of the required teal and cream palette, and lacks the distinctive diner styling elements.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral beige/gray UI surfaces instead of the required diner palette. Should use cream (#fff8ea) for card surfaces and maintain teal (#9fd8d2) or cream primary canvases, not generic neutral backgrounds.

Logged-in dashboard surface has drifted into generic neutral palette while public routes use distinct brand treatment, creating visual discontinuity that reduces perceived product quality after signup/login.

actions: Update dashboard card backgrounds to use cream (#fff8ea) from the diner palette
Replace neutral gray/beige page background with appropriate diner palette surface
Ensure visual consistency between public marketing surfaces and authenticated dashboard experience
Verify other authenticated routes maintain diner palette consistency
